meaning: n.售冰者,送冰人,善于在冰的行走的人
examples: Franco Rollo of the University of Camerino, Italy, has worked on Ötzi the iceman.
Researchers now believe the prehistoric iceman was murdered.
Can you describe the tattoos on the Iceman and their significance?
But the iceman, in his last two meals, had red deer and ibex meat.
The iceman was found in the Oetztal valley on the Austrian-Italian border by Helmut Simon and his wife Erika.
